hypothesis: For the CsPbI3 β→γ transition, fine-tuning the eSEN model on 20–30 DFT-labeled SSNEB images using a loss that weights stress errors threefold over force errors will reduce the required VASP SSNEB restart iterations by at least 40% and maintain octahedral tilting symmetry (|Δθ|,|Δϕ| ≤ 1° relative to DFT) compared with equal energy/force/stress weighting.
